contributor_note: Release-candidate contribution. Sources: Kew POWO for accepted taxonomy and Peru native range; Cultivariable and agronomy literature for cool-season, short-day tuberisation and heat-sensitivity guidance.

habit.note: Cool, moist Andean tuber crop with a long season. Poor fit for normal windowsills; better in large containers or garden beds.

notes: Andean tuber crop from Ullucus tuberosus. Prefers cool, moist conditions and dislikes hot, dry summers. Tuber formation is short-day sensitive, so temperate growers may need to keep plants alive into autumn while protecting them from early frost. Best treated as a specialist balcony-container or garden crop, not a casual indoor herb.
